2605.07649.title: Operating Within the Operational Design Domain: Zero-Shot Perception with Vision-Language Models
2605.07649.paper_summary: Over the last few years, research on autonomous systems has matured to such a degree that the field is increasingly well-positioned to translate research into practical, stakeholder-driven use cases across well-defined domains. However, for a wide-scale practical adoption of autonomous systems, adherence to safety regulations is crucial. Many regulations are influenced by the Operational Design Domain (ODD), which defines the specific conditions in which an autonomous agent can function. This is especially relevant for Automated Driving Systems (ADS), as a dependable perception of ODD elements is essential for safe implementation and auditing. Vision-language models (VLMs) integrate visual recognition and language reasoning, functioning without task-specific training data, which makes them suitable for adaptable ODD perception. To assess whether VLMs can function as zero-shot "ODD sensors" that adapt to evolving definitions, we contribute (i) an empirical study of zero-shot ODD classification and detection using four VLMs on a custom dataset and Mapillary Vistas, along with failure analyses; (ii) an ablation of zero-shot optimization strategies with a cost-performance overview; and (iii) a suite of reusable prompting templates with guidance for adaptation. Our findings indicate that definition-anchored chain-of-thought prompting with persona decomposition performs best, while other methods may result in reduced recall. Overall, our results pave the way for transparent and effective ODD-based perception in safety-critical applications.
2605.07649.paper_summary_zh: 近幾年來，自主系統的研究已經成熟到一個程度，使得該領域越來越能夠將研究轉化為實際的、以利益相關者為驅動的用例，並且涵蓋明確定義的領域。<lb/>然而，為了廣泛實際採用自主系統，遵守安全法規至關重要。<lb/>許多法規受到操作設計領域（Operational Design Domain, ODD）的影響，該領域定義了自主代理可以運作的具體條件。<lb/>這對於自動駕駛系統（Automated Driving Systems, ADS）尤其相關，因為對ODD元素的可靠感知對於安全實施和審核至關重要。<lb/>視覺語言模型（Vision-language models, VLMs）整合了視覺識別和語言推理，無需特定任務的訓練數據，這使得它們適合於可調整的ODD感知。<lb/>為了評估VLMs是否能作為零樣本“ODD傳感器”來適應不斷演變的定義，我們貢獻了（i）一項使用四個VLM在自定義數據集和Mapillary Vistas上進行的零樣本ODD分類和檢測的實證研究，以及失敗分析；（ii）對零樣本優化策略的消融研究，並提供成本效益概述；以及（iii）一套可重用的提示模板，並附有適應指導。<lb/>我們的研究結果表明，基於定義的思維鏈提示與角色分解表現最佳，而其他方法可能導致回憶率降低。<lb/>總體而言，我們的結果為安全關鍵應用中的透明和有效的基於ODD的感知鋪平了道路。
2605.07649.author: Berkehan Ünal et.al.
2605.07649.authors: Berkehan Ünal, Dierend Hauke, Fazlija Dren, Plachetka Christopher
